name_zh: NYT Magazine Editorial纽约时报编辑风
description: 新闻排版派。Georgia衬线标题+编辑室顶部红线+权威感。★主要推荐
base_style_prompt: Editorial journalism aesthetic. HTML top border: 5px solid #C8000A (signature red rule). Paper white (#FEFEF9) background, near-black (#1A1A1A) text, editorial red (#C8000A) accent. Georgia serif for all titles (36pt+). System sans-serif for body (13pt). Section labels in small-caps (letter-spacing 0.15em). Horizontal rule system throughout. Step numbers in large faded Georgia (opacity 5.5%). Code blocks with color-coded left border.
key_principles: 编辑蓝/编辑绿路径标记
path_note: Path A exclusive (HTML→PPTX). ★ 主要推荐用于正式商务。字体精度和间距系统是命脉，AI无法保证排版精确性。
philosophy: 用Georgia衬线字体的权威感 + 精确的horizontal rule系统 + 极克制的单一编辑红，让内容在白纸上自己发声。有温度但有权威感，从不花哨。

css_reference.section_label: font-variant: small-caps; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: #C8000A; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700
css_reference.step_bg_number: font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 140px; color: #C8000A; opacity: 0.055; position: absolute
